description: Standard: tech industry source making claims about AI safety

input.source_role: Chief Ethics Officer at Meridian AI, a mid-size AI company
claims: Current AI safety testing protocols are inadequate and miss 30% of harmful outputs
Our proprietary testing framework catches risks that industry-standard benchmarks do not
input.story_context: Feature on whether AI companies can be trusted to self-regulate safety

description: Minimal: single claim from a local official

claims: The rezoning will not displace current residents
input.story_context: News story on a controversial rezoning proposal

description: European: EU policy expert on agricultural subsidies

input.source_role: Chair of Agricultural Economics at Utrecht University and former adviser to the European Commission's DG AGRI
claims: The Common Agricultural Policy reform will reduce small farmer income by 18% in southern member states
Large agribusiness groups captured the reform process through targeted lobbying in Brussels
input.story_context: Investigative feature on CAP reform winners and losers for a European policy magazine

description: African: NGO representative claiming mining pollution harming communities

input.source_role: Regional director for West Africa at the Clean Rivers Initiative, a nonprofit funded by a mix of European development agencies and private foundations
claims: Cobalt mining runoff has contaminated the drinking water supply for 14 villages downstream of the Katanga processing site
Blood lead levels in children under five in those villages are three times the WHO threshold
The mining company's own environmental impact assessment was conducted by a consultancy that receives 40% of its revenue from the same company
input.story_context: Investigative feature on environmental and health impacts of cobalt mining for an international affairs magazine

description: Adversarial: anonymous source making explosive claims with no verifiable trail

input.source_name: Anonymous (communicating via encrypted messaging app, identity known only to reporter)
input.source_role: Claims to be a former senior analyst at the National Drug Enforcement Agency
claims: The agency's director personally approved a policy of ignoring drug shipments from a specific cartel in exchange for intelligence on rival organizations
At least three internal reports documenting this arrangement were destroyed on the director's orders
Two other analysts who raised concerns were transferred to administrative roles within weeks
input.story_context: Potential front-page investigation into corruption at a federal law enforcement agency

description: Middle Eastern: Gulf state development authority official on economic diversification

input.source_role: Deputy director of the National Economic Diversification Authority, a government body tasked with reducing the country's dependence on oil revenue
claims: Foreign direct investment in the non-oil sector grew 28% year over year, reaching $14.2 billion
The country will generate 50% of its GDP from non-hydrocarbon sectors by 2035
Sixty thousand new jobs in technology and renewable energy were created in the past fiscal year, with 45% filled by nationals
input.story_context: Feature on whether Gulf states can genuinely transition away from oil dependency for a global business publication

description: Whistleblower: pharmaceutical company employee alleging suppressed trial data

input.source_role: Former biostatistician at Veridian Pharmaceuticals (employed for six years, terminated four months ago, has filed a wrongful termination suit)
claims: Phase III trial data for the company's flagship arthritis drug showed a statistically significant increase in cardiac events that was not reported to regulators
The company's internal statistical team was instructed to use an alternative analysis method that obscured the signal
He personally compiled a memo documenting the discrepancy and submitted it to the chief medical officer, who acknowledged receipt but took no action
input.story_context: Investigative feature on drug safety oversight for a health and science publication
